title: Billing
lede: iMash runs on a prepaid balance. This guide shows you how to check your balance, add a payment method, top up funds, and review your usage and transactions.

steps.title: Open the Billing page
steps.content:
1. In the left navigation, open the Account group and click Billing (or go to /billing).
  2. The top of the page shows your Prepaid Balance — the credit that calls, messages, and other usage are drawn from.
  3. Keep the balance topped up so your agents and campaigns never pause. (Pay as you go is shown as Coming Soon; today everything runs on prepaid balance.)

images.caption: The Billing page shows your prepaid balance, payment methods, and add-funds panel
The Billing page shows your prepaid balance, payment methods, and add-funds panel

steps.title: Add a payment method
steps.content:
1. Open the Add Payment Method panel.
  2. Enter a credit/debit card, or connect a US bank account (ACH).
  3. Save it. You can add more than one method and remove any you no longer use.

Your card details are stored securely by our payment processor (Stripe) — iMash never sees your full card number.

steps.title: Add funds to your balance
steps.content:
1. In the Add Funds area, type the dollar amount you want to add.
  2. Choose which saved payment method to charge.
  3. Click to confirm. Your balance updates once the payment is confirmed.

Good to know: card top-ups carry a small 3% processing fee — you're charged the full amount you entered and the balance is credited 3% less. Bank (ACH) top-ups have no processing fee.

steps.title: Review usage and transactions
steps.content:
• Open the Ledger tab to see every credit and debit — money you added, usage drawn down, and any transfers or adjustments.
  • Filter by service type and expand a row to see the balance before and after, so you can trace exactly where spend went.
  • Use the transactions history to review your past card and bank payments.

steps.title: Billing for team members and affiliates
steps.content:
• Team members you invite don't get billing access by default. You can grant it, set a per-member per-minute price, or transfer balance to a member from Team (User Management).
  • If you're an affiliate, an extra Withdrawals tab appears here so you can cash out your commission balance.

support.title: Need Help?
support.content:

  • 📧 Email us at support@imash.io

  • 📚 Check out our API Reference
  • 🎥 Watch our video tutorials
